backups_subtitle: Create, store, download, and restore site data and media from a ZIP archive.
backups_zip_missing: The ZIP extension is not available on this server.
backups_create_hint: The archive contains JSON files from the data folder together with media from public/uploads and uploads, plus private user avatars.
backups_reset_hint: Empties site content and media while keeping accounts, modules, languages, themes, and core settings intact.
backups_reset_warning: A safety backup is created before reset. Content, menus, footer, forms, trash, and media will be cleared.
backups_reset_confirm: Do you really want to reset FlatCMS? Site content and media will be cleared after a safety backup is created.
backups_reset_success: FlatCMS has been reset. Safety backup created: :backup
backups_factory_reset_hint: Deletes all runtime data, re-enables the Install module, and restarts the installer from step 1.
backups_factory_reset_warning: A safety backup is created before the factory reset. Accounts, settings, content, media, translations, forms, and installed.lock will be removed.
backups_factory_reset_confirm: Do you really want to start from scratch? FlatCMS will delete all runtime data, re-enable Install, and send you back to step 1 of the installer.
backups_restore_hint: Upload a ZIP archive generated by FlatCMS or restore an archive already stored on this installation.
backups_restore_warning: Restore replaces the current site data together with its media. A safety backup is created automatically before overwrite.
backups_restore_confirm: This restore will replace the current site data together with its media. Continue?
backups_delete_confirm: Do you really want to delete this backup?
backups_upload_hint: Use a FlatCMS archive containing manifest.json, data/*.json files, media from public/uploads and uploads, and private user avatars.
backups_upload_failed: Unable to upload the ZIP archive.
backups_upload_too_large: The ZIP archive is too large for this server.
backups_upload_partial: The ZIP archive upload is incomplete.
backups_list_hint: :count archive(s) stored in the dedicated backup area.
backups_dashboard_text: Create a backup, restore an archive, or reset site content from the Backups module.
backups_scope_value: JSON files from the data folder, media from public/uploads and uploads, and private avatars stored in storage/uploads/avatars
backups_storage_unavailable: The backup directory is not writable.
backups_error_no_data: No backupable JSON or media file was found.
backups_archive_open_failed: Unable to open the ZIP archive.
backups_archive_invalid: The ZIP archive contains invalid or unauthorized paths.
backups_archive_invalid_json: The archive contains an invalid JSON file.
backups_archive_empty: The archive does not contain any usable JSON or media data.
backups_archive_write_failed: Unable to write the backup ZIP archive.
backups_restore_write_failed: Unable to write restored files to disk.
backups_delete_failed: Unable to delete the backup archive.
backups_help_intro: Use Backups before any heavy operation so you keep a portable archive of your data, media files, and private avatars.
backups_help_step_create: Create an archive before a migration, a major redesign, or a reset.
backups_help_step_restore: Test a restore on another instance to confirm that content and media come back cleanly.
backups_help_step_reset: Use reset only after confirming that a recent backup is available.
backups_empty_text: Create a first backup now to secure the instance before the next changes, imports, or restore tests.
